# Science Simulation Platform — SciSim
> Interactive 3D educational simulations for students worldwide.
> High School to University level content.
> Physics, Math, Chemistry, Biology, Geography, Astronomy, Computer Science,
> Engineering, Neuroscience, Economics, Environmental Science, Interdisciplinary.

## What we offer
- 560+ interactive 3D simulations built with Three.js and Canvas API
- Real-time parameter controls and live formula display
- Self-assessment quizzes (Basic, Advanced, Math MCQ)
- Detailed explanations and FAQ for every simulation
- Custom simulation requests for Premium users
- Discussion/comment system on every simulation

## Subjects
- Physics: Mechanics, Waves & Optics, Electricity & Magnetism, Thermodynamics, Modern Physics
- Mathematics: Algebra, Calculus, Geometry, Trigonometry, Statistics, Chaos Theory
- Chemistry: Atomic Structure, Bonding, Thermochemistry, Equilibrium, Electrochemistry
- Biology: Cell Biology, Genetics, Human Physiology, Plant Biology, Ecology
- Geography: Physical Geography, Earth Science, Atmospheric Science
- Astronomy: Solar System, Stellar Physics, Cosmology, Space Mechanics
- Computer Science: Algorithms, Data Structures, Networking, AI & ML
- Engineering: Electrical, Mechanical, Civil, Aerospace
- Neuroscience: Brain & Neural, Cognitive Science, Psychology
- Economics: Microeconomics, Finance, Game Theory, Macroeconomics
- Environmental: Ecosystems, Climate Science, Renewable Energy
- Interdisciplinary: Cross-subject simulations
- Trending: Current science and technology topics

## Access
- Free: Limited daily access, comment system
- Premium: Full unlimited access + custom simulation requests ($5/month or $36/year)

## Simulation Index
Full list available at: /data/index.json
